text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Huff…… Huff…… Huff…… ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Aah…… I've returned… back here ——

text_block_list.name: Racing Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Stay Gold is a beast～! Was anyone even 
able to catch up to her in the final leg?

text_block_list.name: Racing Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But still, she's tiny compared to 
the others. Seems tough getting 
enclosed during the race～

choice_data_list: You look like you had fun
You look like you had fun
text_block_list.text:
Stay Gold was able to display a splendid 
performance at her debut race. Her 
expression alone showed me her 
satisfaction towards today's race.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's been a while since I've had my 
fill, from today's race that is.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to you…… but ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
The path ahead of us is going to become 
much harder from now on. Are you ready 
for this?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……My other-worldy self barely won 
many races after their debut.

choice_data_list: Yeah, our journey is to destroy all pasts!
Yeah, our journey is to destroy all pasts!
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
If we do this half-heartedly, we'd be 
destined to repeat the same path, 
and that isn't our goal now is it.

choice_data_list: Give me some time to replan our journey
Give me some time to replan our journey
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly why, just as Stay Gold 
says, from now on, the two of us must 
exceed our limits……!

Just like this, Stay Gold's debut race kept 
my heart trembling in excitement for the 
start of our journey, finishing the day 
on a high note.
——The next day.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……I've got to say, it seems as though 
you're starting to appear everywhere 
now.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You've gotten quite used to finding me, 
haven't you? You're all equipped with 
your work tools too.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I guess since you were able to find me, 
I'll listen to what you have to say.

choice_data_list: Yeah. I've got it all mapped out!
Yeah. I've got it all mapped out!
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…… So, have you decided what races 
we should aim for in the Junior year?

Stay Gold's objective was decided early 
on, which is to run in the Classics.

If we are directly aiming for that goal, we 
should be adjusting our training based 
on the requirements for those races.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
The priorities right now are to get stronger 
and correct my bad habits. I guess running 
the Classics all comes down to timing hey…

choice_data_list: I thought this would be easier on you too
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good. I'm on board with the idea 
of adapting to reach the destination.

choice_data_list: But if this is all… it won't be enough
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I don't want to be too locked 
into strict plans either.

The goal to run in the Classics was purely 
the most obvious one to set at the time. 
What's key from now is to be able to 
grow real strength to unleash in reality.

choice_data_list: To walk a path different to your other self
To walk a path different to your other self
text_block_list.text:
Then, to reach a level to join the Classics, 
we have to find a way to make a 
breakthrough to attain true power.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……The measures you're willing to take 
for me may as well be the first treasure 
I find on my journey.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Then let's go on a hunt. For the shining ray 
of light that cuts through gloomy clouds in 
the murky sky.

Just like that, Stay Gold and I are aiming 
towards joining the Classics ——

title: After Debut: Seeking the Shining Ray of Light
